name: test-suite-builder
description: Creates comprehensive test suite with unit, integration, and e2e tests

prompt-plan.name: PLAN TEST SUITE
prompt-plan.prompt:
Read ./design_docs/$1 and review the codebase.

Plan a comprehensive test suite including:
1. Unit tests - for individual functions/classes/components
2. Integration tests - for cross-module interactions (if not already created)
3. E2E tests - for complete user workflows
4. Performance tests - if relevant per design doc

Create a test plan document at ./tests/TEST_PLAN.md describing:
- What will be tested
- Test categories and organization
- How to run each test category
- Expected coverage

DO NOT write tests yet.

prompt-unit.name: CREATE UNIT TESTS
prompt-unit.prompt:
Create comprehensive unit tests according to ./tests/TEST_PLAN.md

Focus on:
- Testing individual functions/methods
- Edge cases and error conditions
- Mocking dependencies
- High code coverage for critical paths

Organize tests logically (e.g., ./tests/unit/module_name/)

Create or update ./run_unit_tests.sh that runs all unit tests and returns exit code 0 if all pass.

prompt-integration.name: CREATE INTEGRATION TESTS
prompt-integration.prompt:
Create integration tests according to ./tests/TEST_PLAN.md

If ./tests/integration/ already has tests from integration-validator, enhance them. Otherwise create new ones.

Focus on:
- Testing interactions between modules
- Data flow across components
- API contracts

Create or update ./run_integration_tests.sh that runs all integration tests and returns exit code 0 if all pass.

prompt-e2e.name: CREATE E2E TESTS
prompt-e2e.prompt:
Create end-to-end tests according to ./tests/TEST_PLAN.md

Focus on:
- Complete user workflows from start to finish
- Real-world scenarios from the design doc
- Testing the full system integration
- Use appropriate tools (Playwright, Selenium, etc.) if this is a UI application

Create tests in ./tests/e2e/

Create or update ./run_e2e_tests.sh that runs all e2e tests and returns exit code 0 if all pass.

prompt-orchestrator.name: CREATE TEST ORCHESTRATOR
prompt-orchestrator.prompt:
Create a master test script ./run_all_tests.sh that:
1. Runs unit tests (./run_unit_tests.sh)
2. Runs integration tests (./run_integration_tests.sh)
3. Runs e2e tests (./run_e2e_tests.sh)
4. Aggregates results
5. Returns exit code 0 only if ALL tests pass, non-zero otherwise
6. Outputs clear summary of what passed/failed

Make the script executable (chmod +x).

Also create ./tests/README.md documenting how to run tests.
